MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Nagy for Johnson Seto, who is present.
Alice Tam, Limited Scope Attorney for Mieko Sakuma, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 148 22nd Avenue, Apt. 6, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. Trial date of 3/23/09 is vacated.

JPT Will Chen, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
